overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, starting on a neon-lit street with passing vehicles, turning through a plaza with an emergency scene, and ascending stairs to an upper pedestrian level. The footage showcases the game's futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic with towering buildings, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric night lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking along a sidewalk beside a distinctive blue-painted road. Neon billboards glow in the distance atop an elevated highway structure, while a tall glass skyscraper rises on the left. A futuristic sedan passes by on the road around the 8-second mark.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along a street section with a red-painted curb and orange safety railing. A massive digital billboard on the right displays advertisements, while the elevated highway structure looms ahead. An Arasaka van drives past around the 20-second mark.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into an open plaza area where an emergency scene is unfolding. A futuristic emergency vehicle with glowing red lights is parked near yellow and black barricades, with emergency personnel standing nearby. The elevated highway structure is now visible to the right, and a wide concrete staircase leads upward in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase beneath the elevated highway. A glowing green holographic display and a palm tree are visible on the right side. A pedestrian descends the stairs toward the camera. The environment is more enclosed and sheltered from the open sky.

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into an upper-level pedestrian walkway. A storefront with vibrant purple neon lighting glows on the right, while a curved concrete building stands nearby. The camera continues walking along the sidewalk past street lamps and distant pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city street, through a chaotic emergency plaza, and up into an elevated pedestrian district. It begins by walking along a sidewalk beside a blue-painted road, passing a towering glass skyscraper as a futuristic sedan glides by under the glow of distant billboards. As the camera continues past a red curb and orange safety railings, an Arasaka van drives past before the path turns left into an open plaza where a futuristic emergency vehicle with flashing red lights is stationed behind yellow and black barricades. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase beneath an elevated highway, passing a glowing green hologram and a descending pedestrian. Finally, the environment opens up onto an upper-level walkway, moving past a vibrant purple neon storefront and curved concrete architecture toward distant pedestrians under the city lights.
